creator: bdrewery@FreeBSD.org
text:
Please fix this port, it is causing 30 ports to be skipped.

pkg-static:
lstat(/wrkdirs/usr/ports/graphics/edje/work/stage/usr/local/bin/edje_watch):
No such file or directory

This is not a poudriere problem. It is a problem with the port. It
indicates that the plist references a file that is not being installed.

If you look in the build log you can see that edje_watch is not actually
built or installed. It should be removed from the plist:

  Build edje_watch.............: no


-- 
Regards,
Bryan Drewery
